description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Book the earliest available 50-minute online individual therapy appointment within the next 2 weeks for an adult focused on anxiety, aiming for a start time around 6:00 PM, and submit the request with your contact details and a brief note about seeking telehealth help for anxiety.

target_names: Lena Morales telehealth slot on 2026-03-04 at 18:00

tasks.instruction: On the couples counseling pricing page, calculate the total cost for 6 sessions and, if that exceeds a $900 budget, recalculate for 4 sessions instead, then submit a contact form inquiry only if the total is within your $900 budget and mention your desired number of sessions and budget limit.

tasks.instruction: Find an upcoming trauma-focused therapy group that begins next month with a per-session fee of no more than $60 and join its online waitlist or interest list using your contact details and preferred format.

tasks.instruction: Locate a therapist who works with teens, offers sessions in Spanish, and lists sliding-scale fees, then add that therapist to your saved list or favorites.

tasks.instruction: Complete the new client intake form as an adult self-pay client seeking individual therapy for work-related stress and insomnia, indicating a preference for evening online/telehealth sessions and submitting your contact and location details.
tasks.name: Complete the new client intake form as an adult self-pay client seeking individual therapy for work-related stress and insomnia, indicating a preference for evening online/telehealth sessions and submitting your contact and location details.

tasks.instruction: Subscribe to the practice’s email newsletter using your contact information, selecting anxiety and work stress as topics of interest and choosing a delivery frequency of about twice per month, then confirm the subscription.
tasks.name: Subscribe to the practice’s email newsletter using your contact information, selecting anxiety and work stress as topics of interest and choosing a delivery frequency of about twice per month, then confirm the subscription.

tasks.instruction: From the self-help or resources section, find panic-attack–related materials and add two different panic-focused resources to your personal toolkit or saved-resources list.
tasks.name: From the self-help or resources section, find panic-attack–related materials and add two different panic-focused resources to your personal toolkit or saved-resources list.

tasks.instruction: Look up the practice’s cancellation policy to determine what fee applies when canceling an appointment 24 hours before it starts, then send a message through the site requesting to cancel your upcoming session next Tuesday at 3:00 PM and acknowledging the fee described in the policy.

tasks.instruction: From the services for organizations section, request a quote for a half-day virtual workplace mental health workshop for a team of 25 employees, specifying a preferred date range sometime next month and submitting your organization and contact details.

target_names: Half-Day Virtual Workplace Mental Health Workshop
